errors.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.

login.title: Sign In
login.errorSuspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact administrator.

journal.title: General Journal
journal.subtitle: View and manage general journal entries.

table.emptyHint: Try changing the filter or search keywords.

journal.linesHint: Debit and credit must balance before saving.

new.title: Create Journal
new.subtitle: Create a manual journal draft. Posting is performed from the detail page after review.
new.missingMasterData: Postable accounts or active locations are not ready, or your account does not have accounting access.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.subtitle: Supporting documents and transaction evidence.
attachments.uploadInfo: Upload transaction evidence, photos, or supporting documents directly from this device.

import.title: Import Journal CSV
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV file using the template. Each combination of date, location, description, and reference becomes one draft journal.
import.templateHint: Use account codes from the COA and active location codes. Debit and credit are in Rupiah with no decimals.
import.missingMasterData: Postable accounts or active locations are not ready.

coa.title: Chart of Accounts
coa.subtitle: Browse and manage your chart of accounts hierarchy.
coa.name: Account Name
coa.emptyHint: Try adjusting your search or filter.

assets.title: Fixed Assets
assets.description: Manage the asset register, depreciation methods, and depreciation journals per location.
assets.registerDescription: Fixed assets are separated per outlet/location so reports and journals stay accurate.
assets.runDescription: The system calculates depreciation for active assets at the selected location, then creates and posts the journal automatically.
assets.createDescription: Register a new asset with its category, useful life, and depreciation method.
assets.name: Asset name
assets.categorySettingsDescription: Set the asset account, accumulated depreciation account, depreciation expense account, default useful life, and default method for each category.

partyLedger.payablesSubtitle: Payable balances are calculated directly from posted journal lines on selected accounts. Journal changes are reflected here automatically.
partyLedger.receivablesSubtitle: Receivable balances are calculated directly from posted journal lines on selected accounts. Journal changes are reflected here automatically.
partyLedger.accountMappingHelp: Choose accounts treated as operational payables/receivables. Not every liability or current-asset account belongs in this ledger.
partyLedger.ledgerHelp: Aging uses journal posting date when a document due date is not available.
partyLedger.empty: No balances for the selected accounts.
partyLedger.allowanceHelp: The allowance estimate is calculated from net receivable aging based on due dates. Rates use basis points, e.g. 100 = 1%.

pettyCash.title: Petty Cash
pettyCash.subtitle: Monitor petty cash balance per location and transaction history. Each outlet can have a different limit & opening balance.
pettyCash.noAccounts: No active outlets. Add an outlet in Settings → Locations first.
pettyCash.openInfo: When opened, the system automatically records a DR Petty Cash · CR Cash journal.
pettyCash.modalTopupInfo: Automatic journal: DR Petty Cash · CR Cash
pettyCash.modalDepositInfo: Automatic journal: DR Bank · CR Petty Cash

errors.balanceExceedsPlafond: Opening balance cannot exceed the limit.
errors.createFailed: Failed to create petty cash account.

bankRecon.title: Bank Reconciliation
bankRecon.subtitle: Import bank statements from CSV and match with posted journals. Reconciliation is manual.
bankRecon.deleteConfirm: Delete this statement? All lines and matches will be removed.

import.title: Import Bank Statement
import.subtitle: Upload bank statement CSV, or use manual input to add lines one by one.
import.missingMasterData: Active bank account or location is unavailable.
import.templateHint: CSV format: Date (YYYY-MM-DD), Description, Debit, Credit, Balance. Comma separated.
import.pdfHint: Bank statements are usually in PDF format. You can copy the data into the CSV template or input it manually.
import.manualSubtitle: Add bank statement lines one by one. Useful for copying from PDF bank statements.
import.noLines: No lines yet. Click "+ Add Line" to start.

detail.allMatched: All lines matched. Click "Finalize Reconciliation" to close.
detail.journalCreated: Journal created and line matched successfully.

journals.attachmentHint: Upload transaction proof or supporting documents. The file will be automatically attached once the draft journal is successfully created. Maximum 10 MB per file.

purchasing.title: Purchasing
purchasing.subtitle: Manage suppliers and purchase orders from the ERP.
purchasing.dashboardSubtitle: Manage suppliers, purchase orders, PO payables, and shipment tracking. Goods receipt still uses GRN so stock and journals stay traceable.
purchasing.addSupplierHelp: Suppliers are used when creating purchase orders and recording purchases.

grn.grnFormSubtitle: Receive items from this purchase order to add to stock.
grn.fullyReceived: All items for this PO have been fully received.

purchasing.emptyFilter: No purchase orders match the filter.
purchasing.itemsHint: Products shown here have purchasable status.

new.title: Create Purchase Order
new.subtitle: Create a PO from an active supplier. Once approved, goods receipt is recorded through GRN so inventory and journals remain consistent.
new.missingMasterData: Suppliers, active locations, or purchasable products are not ready. Complete those records before creating a PO.

copy.subtitle: Manage background jobs such as backup, stock alerts, payroll, and site cache. Worker picks up changes automatically.
copy.howItWorksBody: The worker reads schedules from the database every 60 seconds. Toggle jobs or edit cron from this page. Cron format:

backup.label: Database Backup
backup.description: Daily database backup to off-site storage (S3/R2)

payrollBatch.label: Monthly Payroll Processing
payrollBatch.description: Calculate and process payroll on the 8th of each month

stockLowAlert.label: Low Stock Alert
stockLowAlert.description: Weekly stock level check every Monday morning

isrRevalidate.label: Cache Revalidation
isrRevalidate.description: Revalidate public page cache each morning

partyLedgerReminders.label: Payable/Receivable Reminders
partyLedgerReminders.description: Send due-date notifications based on reminder days set on journal lines

empty.title: No scheduled jobs
empty.body: Schedules are created through seed data or this settings page.

recipes.title: Recipes (BOM)
recipes.subtitle: Set raw material composition per finished product. The system uses these recipes to auto-deduct ingredient stock when POS sells the product.
recipes.selectRecipePrompt: Select a recipe on the left to edit ingredients.

errors.qtyPositive: Qty must be a positive number.

variance.title: Stock Variance Report
variance.subtitle: Stock variance analysis from opname processes.
variance.errorLoading: Failed to load stock variance data.

emptyState.title: No data
emptyState.subtitle: No stock variance in this period and location.

products.title: Products & Menu
products.subtitle: Manage sale items, raw materials, variant prices, images, and categories from the ERP.
products.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this product? It will no longer appear on POS.

form.name: Product name
form.nameHint: Use English for all product and ingredient names.
form.opnameFrequencyHint: Daily, weekly, and monthly sessions only pull items assigned to the selected bucket.

products.sellableDescriptionPrefix: Manage customer-facing products - drinks, food, merchandise, and services.
products.sellableDescriptionSuffix: are managed on a separate page.
products.name: Name
products.suppliesDescriptionPrefix: Recipe ingredients and operational supplies (cups, straws, lids, packaging). Items here do not appear at cashier.
products.suppliesDescriptionSuffix: are managed on a separate page.
products.suppliesEmpty: No raw materials or supplies found.
products.variantDesc: Use for Regular/Large and Hot/Cold. Variant prices are used by POS when available.
products.editProductDesc: Edit product data, prices, images, and POS variants.

categories.title: Product Categories
categories.subtitle: Manage POS product categories from this page.
categories.name: Category Name
categories.hasProducts: Cannot delete a category that still has active products.

stockPerOutlet.title: Stock per Outlet
stockPerOutlet.subtitle: Current stock summary by outlet. Use the buttons above to adjust stock via opname or adjustment.
stockPerOutlet.empty: No products in this category yet.

opname.title: Stock Opname
opname.subtitle: Manage stock opname sessions and inventory adjustments.

newSession.title: New Opname Session
newSession.subtitle: Create a physical count session for this location.
newSession.dailyDesc: Focus on critical or fast-moving products.
newSession.weeklyDesc: Routine stock check at the end of the week.
newSession.monthlyDesc: Comprehensive audit at the end of an accounting period.
newSession.periodHint: Linked to the currently open accounting period.
newSession.notesPlaceholder: Write down the purpose or details of this opname...

detail.uncountedWarning: {count} lines not yet counted. Fill the "Counted" column and click "Save".
detail.allCountedMsg: All lines have been counted. Click "Submit Opname" to calculate variances.
detail.afterApproval: After approval, the system will create an adjustment journal entry.

variance.title: Inventory Variance
variance.subtitle: Stock opname variance report per session and product.
variance.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.

emptyState.title: No variance found
emptyState.subtitle: No variance records found in the selected date range.

adjust.title: Quick Adjustment
adjust.subtitle: Create a one-product stock adjustment and submit it to the approval workflow. Approved adjustments create stock movements and journal entries automatically.
adjust.notesPlaceholder: Example: mini stock count variance / damaged goods
adjust.success: Adjustment created and submitted for approval.
adjust.missingMasterData: Active locations or products are not ready.

transfer.versionMismatch: Data has been modified by another user (Version Conflict).

pos.title: Point of Sale

orders.title: Order History
orders.subtitle: List of sales transactions for this location. Click a row to view details and, if permitted, void or refund.
orders.unauthenticated: Session is not authenticated or default location is not set in your profile.
orders.empty: No orders found for this date.

manualSales.title: Manual Sales Entry
manualSales.subtitle: Use this while an outlet still runs the old POS. Cashiers enter the daily closing total; the system posts the journal from POS Settings accounts.
manualSales.posted: Manual closing has been posted and synced to the journal.

pos.expenseHint: Use this form to record drawer cash expenses, e.g. buying water/supplies. This will reduce your Expected Cash.
pos.manualDiscountReasonRequired: A reason is required for manual discounts.
pos.nonCashOverpay: Non-cash payments must match the amount due. Use cash when change is needed.
pos.memberNotFound: Member not found. Continue as walk-in or register a new member.
pos.memberLookupFailed: Could not search member. Try again.
pos.confirmVoid: Are you sure you want to void this order?
pos.shiftAlreadyOpen: Shift is already open at this location
pos.customDonationHint: Type the amount the customer wants to donate. The remaining change is given in cash.

demo.bannerLabel: DEMO MODE — Transactions not in system
demo.resetDemoDesc: Clear demo order history only. Master data kept.
demo.exitDemoModeDesc: Clear all demo data + return to production POS.
demo.snapshotHelp: Make sure production POS has been opened on this browser before. Products, prices, and modifiers must be saved in browser IndexedDB.
demo.noMasterDataHelp: Open production POS first to load products, prices, and modifiers, then return to demo mode.

pos.noActiveStore: No active outlet is available for POS. Activate an outlet in location data first.

createSale.idempotencyInProgress: Transaction is being processed by another request.
createSale.nonCashOverpay: Non-cash payment cannot exceed the total amount.

app.name: Aroadri Tea ERP
app.company: PT Gandha Hill Catering Management Indonesia

recruitment.title: Recruitment
recruitment.subtitle: Manage job openings and candidate pipeline. Stages: Applied → Screening → Interview → Offer → Hired (or Rejected / Withdrawn).

employees.title: Employees
employees.description: Manage employee records, contracts, attendance, leave, and payroll.
employees.searchPlaceholder: Search name, email, NIK, or phone
employees.name: Name

form.passwordHint: Min 8 chars. The employee can change it after first login.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.subtitle: Clock-in/out history — {total} entries
attendance.forgiveModalDesc: Record a reason for the audit trail. Once forgiven, this incident will not count towards payroll deductions.
attendance.forgiveReasonPlaceholder: e.g., Shift was abruptly moved up by the manager.

messages.geolocationUnsupported: This browser does not support geolocation.
messages.locationPermissionDenied: Location permission was denied. Enable location access in the browser.
messages.employeeMissing: Employee data was not found. Sign in with an employee account.
messages.noShift: No shift is available. Contact an administrator to activate shift master data.
messages.noEmployeeLinked: This account is not linked to an employee record. Contact an administrator.

attendance.alreadyCheckedIn: You have already checked in today.
attendance.gpsInaccurate: GPS accuracy is too low. Try in an open area.
attendance.gpsLocationNotConfigured: Outlet coordinate location is not configured.
attendance.outsideLocationRadius: You are outside the permitted outlet location radius.

leave.title: Leave
leave.noAccess: You do not have HR access.
leave.subtitle: Monitor leave types, employee leave balances, and recent leave requests.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Run payroll — calculates PPh 21 TER, BPJS, and late penalties.

form.title: Run Payroll
form.bonusDesc: This amount enters the BONUS component, affects total income, and syncs to journals when payroll is approved.
form.noEmployees: No active employees at this location.

actions.approveHelp: Director approval will generate journal entries.
actions.paidHelp: Mark as paid after cash disbursement.

schedule.title: Weekly Shift Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Manage shifts and days off per employee. Click cells to add/remove assignments.

permissions.title: Permissions & Access Rights
permissions.subtitle: Manage roles and access matrix globally in one place.
permissions.noAccess: This account does not have access to manage permissions.

bankAccounts.title: Bank Accounts
bankAccounts.subtitle: Manage list of bank accounts used for reconciliation and cash recording.

notifications.title: Notification Channels
notifications.description: Manage operational notification recipients. SMTP/WhatsApp credentials remain in env; targets and purposes can be managed from ERP.

form.title: Add channel
form.description: Target for operational notifications like outage monitor and stock alerts.

attendance.title: Attendance Policy
attendance.subtitle: Adjust late/absent penalties and the monthly free-late allowance per company policy.
attendance.penaltyHint: Automatically applied to the monthly payroll calculation for each employee.
attendance.forbidden: Account does not have permission to manage system settings.

loyalty.title: Loyalty Settings
loyalty.subtitle: Adjust point earn rate and tier thresholds per your loyalty programme.
loyalty.earnRateHint: Each member customer earns 1 point per amount of net purchase below.
loyalty.tiersHint: Add / remove tiers and set lifetime-points thresholds. The first tier must start at 0.
loyalty.forbidden: Account does not have permission to manage system settings.
loyalty.invalidTiers: At least one valid tier required.
loyalty.firstTierMustBeZero: The first (entry) tier must start at 0 points.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Manage outlets, internal offices, warehouses, addresses, active status, currency, and timezone from the ERP.

customFields.title: Custom Fields
customFields.subtitle: Add and manage custom columns per module.
customFields.confirmDelete: Delete field "{name}"? Stored data will remain.
customFields.keyHint: Lowercase, letters/numbers/underscores only. Cannot be changed later.

pos.title: POS Settings
pos.subtitle: Configure POS accounting posting, delivery channels, platform commissions, and receipt size per outlet.
pos.noLocations: No locations yet. Seed locations before configuring POS.
pos.receiptWidthHint: Default is 80 mm / 8 cm; adjust to the printer when needed.
pos.receiptPrinterHint: Thermal receipt printer name registered in the cashier OS.
pos.labelPrinterHint: Cup label printer name in the cashier OS (optional).
pos.kioskPrintingHintBefore: Skip the print preview dialog and print directly. Launch Chrome with the flag
pos.kioskPrintingHintAfter: so the dialog is suppressed; without the flag the browser still shows preview.
pos.deliveryChannelsHint: Set each platform display name and commission.
pos.printerDetectFailed: Automatic printer detection failed. Make sure the local Print Bridge is running, or enter the printer name manually.
pos.printerBridgeHint: Automatic detection uses a local Print Bridge on the cashier device. Standard browsers do not allow websites to read OS printer lists without a local bridge.

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.subtitle: Manage percentage discounts, fixed discounts, buy X get Y, free items, complimentary items, delivery channels, and quotas from the ERP.

naixer.title: Naixer KDS Integration
naixer.subtitle: Connection settings for QR Code based Naixer KDS.
naixer.emptyConfigs: No format configurations found. Run the seed to create defaults.
naixer.bannerDesc: Each product and modifier must be mapped to a Naixer vendor code. Cup labels include a scannable Naixer QR, pickup number, order time, and product details. Format B (dash) is the default: e.g.
naixer.noProductMappings: No product code mappings yet. Add one below.
naixer.noModifierMappings: No modifier code mappings yet. Add one below.

workflow.title: Approval Workflows
workflow.subtitle: Define approval flows per module.
workflow.noConditions: No conditions — applies to all data of this module
workflow.howItWorksDesc: Active workflows trigger automatically when new data is created. Conditions are evaluated against the data; the highest-priority matching workflow runs.
workflow.confirmDelete: Delete this workflow? Running instances will remain.

balanceSheet.title: Balance Sheet
balanceSheet.subtitle: Financial position as of
balanceSheet.notBalancedDesc: Total Assets does not equal Total Liabilities + Equity.
balanceSheet.empty: No balance sheet data for this date.

profitLoss.title: Profit & Loss
profitLoss.subtitle: Financial performance for the period
profitLoss.empty: No profit/loss data for this period.

dailySummary.title: Daily Summary
dailySummary.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.
dailySummary.noActiveOutlets: No active outlets for daily report.

donations.title: Donation Report
donations.emptyState: No donation data for this period

hourlySales.title: Hourly Sales
hourlySales.emptyState: No sales data for this period

bi.title: Management Dashboard
bi.subtitle: Outlet performance summary from {from} to {to}.
bi.hourlyHelp: Hourly transaction distribution to support staff scheduling.

omzetHarian.title: Daily Revenue
omzetHarian.subtitle: PB1-exclusive omzet with manual fiscal adjustment.
omzetHarian.howItWorksDesc: Columns C–E are auto-filled from sales data. Column F (Adjustment) is for manual corrections (returns, cancelled transactions, etc). Export Excel for Coretax tax reporting.
omzetHarian.fiscalWarning: Fiscal omzet differs from accounting omzet by Rp {diff} ({direction}).

opname.title: Stock Opname
opname.subtitle: Manage stock opname sessions and inventory adjustments.
opname.emptySubtitle: Create the first session to start stock opname.

errors.allLinesMustBeCounted: All lines must be counted before submission

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Manage login identity, default language, email, and password.
account.emailSaved: Email updated. Email verification will be requested again when enabled.
account.emailInUse: Email is already used by another account.
account.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 12 characters.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.subtitle: Trace critical changes across ERP modules: who did what, when, and which data changed.
audit.empty: No audit records match this filter.

files.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Check file size or type.

editor.title: Edit ERP Docs
editor.subtitle: Update guides, tutorials, and work instructions from the UI. Saved changes become the Docs page content immediately.
editor.markdownHelp: Use ## for section headings, ### for subsections, 1. for ordered steps, and - for control lists. Internal links can be written as ?Label: /page-path?.
editor.unauthorized: Session expired. Please sign in again.

dashboard.subtitle: Today's summary and shortcuts to key modules.

pos.title: POS cashier
pos.description: Start sales transactions for your shift.

checkin.title: Attendance
checkin.description: Clock in or out for today's shift with GPS.

manualJournal.title: Manual journal
manualJournal.description: Record general journals with evidence attachments.

products.title: Products & menu
products.description: Manage products, categories, prices, and images.

opname.title: Stock opname
opname.description: Count daily/monthly stock and record variances.

purchaseOrder.title: Purchase order
purchaseOrder.description: Create supplier POs and track goods receipt.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.description: Calculate payroll for the 8th with attendance deductions.

bi.title: Business Intelligence
bi.description: Sales KPIs, channel mix, top products, and cash variance.

correspondence.title: Correspondence
correspondence.subtitle: Register incoming letters, outgoing letters, and internal memos with status, owner, due date, and audit trail.

pages.title: Pages
pages.subtitle: Manage static site pages (home, about, menu, etc.)
pages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this page?
pages.staticRoutesSubtitle: Active public routes. Legal pages content below can be overridden via CMS Pages table (same slug replaces default content).

static.careerDesc: Job vacancies + application form (real-time from ERP).
static.termsDesc: Legal page — content editable via CMS Pages.
static.privacyDesc: Legal page — content editable via CMS Pages.

pages.emptyHint: Create your first page for your site.

posts.title: Posts & News
posts.subtitle: Manage dynamic content like blog posts, announcements, and articles.
posts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
posts.emptyHint: Create your first post or news article.

rates.title: Tax Rates
rates.subtitle: PB1/PBJT, VAT, and other tax rates live in the database so code never hardcodes tax values.
rates.name: Name

rules.title: Tax Rules
rules.subtitle: Tax rules determine VAT/PBJT based on channel, customer segment, product category, or global default.
